body_content:
Published by Travelxploria on Sat Jun 14 2025

Nainital is a popular holiday destination among the North Indians. It is a famous spot in Uttarakhand that is a favorite among tourists during the winter season. The hill station boasts undefiled lakes and a beautiful view. Nainital looks absolutely breathtaking during winters when it is covered with snow.

The mountain peaks look surreal and mesmerizing when covered in pearly white snow. If you are somebody who loves chilling winters and the snow, Nainital is the place for you. The lodges and resorts are warm enough to make you feel cozy and when you step out, the view of the snow will leave you amazed. While planning your Kumaon tour package, make sure to visit this place in the right months.
If you are looking for Here in Travelxploria we have the perfect tour package for your wonderful vacation. Travelxploria is one of the best travel agency in Kolkata, loved by hundreds of happy customers.

Experience The Best Kumaon Tour Package

Nainital is known for its snowfall. The best time to experience it is from December to January. Nainital is a subtropical highland that receives snowfall every two to three years. You are sure to witness snowfall from late December to January. Here are a few fun activities you can do during snowfall in Nainital:

Cable Car Ride

You can take a cable car ride to Snow View Point in Nainital. Include this activity in your Kumaon tourpackage if you love to see snowfall because this experience is worth all the effort. The snow-covered roads and trees will make you thrilled and excited. You can enjoy the view from a cable car which starts from the foothills of Nainital. One can also see the icy peaks of Nanda Devi, Nanda Kot, and Trishul from Snow View Point.

Hiking

Another fun activity to do during winter in Nainital is hiking. Tourists can go to Tiffin Top which is also known as Dorothy’s Seat. It is a famous picnic spot that has a view of the snow-covered town of Nainital. You can also see the Kumaon region from Tiffin Top. One can take part in various adventurous activities such as rappelling and rock climbing to enjoy the vacation.

Boating

You should go boating when in Nainital. It is a different experience that is worth trying during winter. Most Kumaon tour packages have boating on their list. The chilly winds and mesmerizing beauty are sure to capture your attention. There are a lot of boating options that you can choose from such as a row boat, paddle boat, gondola boat, etc. This is an activity you should try during winter. However, remember that you should go boating only when it is not snowing. It can be dangerous if the temperature falls to a freezing low.

Play with snow

The best experience you can enjoy while it is snowing in Nainital is playing with snow. Unleash the inner child in you and make snowmen. You can also make snowballs and throw them at each other. These are fun games that are worth remembering. Along with doing various fun activities, remember to enjoy these small moments with your family and friends. If you want to experience a magical time you can take help from top tour operators from Kolkata

If you are planning your Kumaon tour package to see snowfall in Nainital, make sure to choose the time between December to January. This is the ideal time to visit the holiday destination and enjoy the snow activities. If you need any help planning a tour let the best travel agency in Kolkata guide you
